2604.05183.title: OrthoFuse: Training-free Riemannian Fusion of Orthogonal Style-Concept Adapters for Diffusion Models
2604.05183.paper_summary: In a rapidly growing field of model training there is a constant practical interest in parameter-efficient fine-tuning and various techniques that use a small amount of training data to adapt the model to a narrow task. However, there is an open question: how to combine several adapters tuned for different tasks into one which is able to yield adequate results on both tasks? Specifically, merging subject and style adapters for generative models remains unresolved. In this paper we seek to show that in the case of orthogonal fine-tuning (OFT), we can use structured orthogonal parametrization and its geometric properties to get the formulas for training-free adapter merging. In particular, we derive the structure of the manifold formed by the recently proposed Group-and-Shuffle ($\mathcal{GS}$) orthogonal matrices, and obtain efficient formulas for the geodesics approximation between two points. Additionally, we propose a $\text{spectra restoration}$ transform that restores spectral properties of the merged adapter for higher-quality fusion. We conduct experiments in subject-driven generation tasks showing that our technique to merge two $\mathcal{GS}$ orthogonal matrices is capable of uniting concept and style features of different adapters. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first training-free method for merging multiplicative orthogonal adapters. Code is available via the $\href{https://github.com/ControlGenAI/OrthoFuse}{link}$.
2604.05183.paper_summary_zh: 在快速增長的模型訓練領域中，對於參數高效的微調以及各種使用少量訓練數據來適應模型於狹窄任務的技術始終存在實際興趣。<lb/>然而，有一個未解決的問題：如何將為不同任務調整的幾個適配器合併成一個，從而能夠在這兩個任務上產生足夠的結果？<lb/>具體而言，合併生成模型的主題和風格適配器仍然沒有解決方案。<lb/>在本文中，我們試圖展示在正交微調（OFT）的情況下，我們可以利用結構化的正交參數化及其幾何特性來獲得無需訓練的適配器合併公式。<lb/>特別地，我們推導了最近提出的群組與洗牌（$\mathcal{GS}$）正交矩陣所形成的流形的結構，並獲得了兩點之間的測地線近似的高效公式。<lb/>此外，我們提出了一種$\text{spectra restoration}$變換，該變換恢復了合併適配器的光譜特性，以實現更高質量的融合。<lb/>我們在主題驅動的生成任務中進行了實驗，顯示我們合併兩個$\mathcal{GS}$正交矩陣的技術能夠統一不同適配器的概念和風格特徵。<lb/>據我們所知，這是第一種無需訓練的合併乘法正交適配器的方法。<lb/>代碼可通過$\href{https://github.com/ControlGenAI/OrthoFuse}{link}$獲得。
2604.05183.author: Ali Aliev et.al.
2604.05183.authors: Ali Aliev, Kamil Garifullin, Nikolay Yudin, Vera Soboleva, Alexander Molozhavenko, Ivan Oseledets, Aibek Alanov, Maxim Rakhuba
